source_text: Round-robin um um load balancing scheme, so I'm not sure if that's getting it what you're asking? Yeah, yeah, I think that answers my question. Load balancing is not a one size fits all. Mark mentioned looking at different metrics as a way to load balance across different servers, which was a clever approach. Mark was very open about the fact that load balancing isn't an area he's an expert on and this is okay. It's fine to be honest when you are asked about things that are at the limits of your knowledge. Okay, cool. Um, yeah, all right, are you are you are you done with your design, um or is there anything else that you want to add? Yeah, let me think about that and gimme gimme just a moment like I I mean it again it you know I've way oversimplified this but um, um... Ah! I guess, I think if I were to also think about this at a global scale. I mean Spotify is a global app and so, it's it's possible so uh replication, I didn't really talk about replication other than to do the math
reference_translation: 轮询负载均衡方案。不知道这是不是你想要的答案。是的，我认为这就是我想要的答案。负载均衡并不是通用方案。 马克谈到了用不同的指标对不同服务器进行负载均衡，这个方法很巧妙。马克坦诚地说他并不擅长负载均衡，但没关系。当问到你知识盲点的时候，诚实回答就好。 好的。你的设计部分介绍完了吗？还有别的要补充吗？ 我想想。我把问题太过简单化了，但是…… 我想如果我也从全球范围去想， Spotify 是个全球性软件，有可能进行复制。除了计算以外，我没有讨论过复制的问题，
